---
title: "Get Involved"
---

## Weekly Meetings

We hold weekly lab meetings open to anyone interested. Come by, see what we're working on, and meet the team — no commitment required.

**Location:** [Green Hall, GR 3.316](https://map.concept3d.com/?id=1772#!m/550863?share){target="_blank"} (Thomas Spencer Hall)

## Student Research Opportunities

PRISE Lab offers hands-on research experience for undergraduate and graduate students at UT Dallas. No prior research experience is required — just genuine interest and reliability. We mentor students through every step of the research process.

**Interested? [Apply here.](https://profiles.utdallas.edu/students/create){target="_blank"}**

## Current Opportunities

::: {.opportunity-card}

<div class="opportunity-thumb"><a href="projects/water-quality.qmd"><img src="images/water-fountain.jpg" alt="Campus water fountain and bottle-filling station at UT Dallas"></a></div>

::: {.opportunity-content}
### [Campus Drinking Water Quality Study](projects/water-quality.qmd)

[[UTD Green Fund](https://studentaffairs.utdallas.edu/initiatives/green-fund/){target="_blank"} student-led research initiative (Fall 2026)]{.subtitle}

Testing campus drinking water for PFAS, lead, and other contaminants; surveying willingness to pay for improvements; recruiting students from environmental science, social science, and engineering.
:::

:::

::: {.opportunity-card}

<div class="opportunity-thumb"><a href="projects/applications-manager.qmd"><img src="images/applications-review.jpg" alt="Student reviewing documents on a laptop"></a></div>

::: {.opportunity-content}
### [Student Applications Manager](projects/applications-manager.qmd)

[Volunteer role — join PRISE Lab]{.subtitle}

Become part of PRISE as our Student Applications Manager. Help us review incoming applications and match students to ongoing projects, while gaining a first taste of life inside a research lab. A few hours per week.
:::

:::

::: {.opportunity-card}

<div class="opportunity-thumb"><a href="projects/nightlights-replications.qmd"><img src="images/nightlights-korea.jpg" alt="Satellite nighttime lights over the Korean peninsula"></a></div>

::: {.opportunity-content}
### [Nightlights Replication Reviewer](projects/nightlights-replications.qmd)

[Volunteer role — join PRISE Lab]{.subtitle}

Read published economics papers that use satellite nighttime lights and help us pinpoint where the nightlight data shows up in each study's main results. Learn to read empirical research on the job. A few hours per week.
:::

:::
